title: hieracium nigrescens subsp. kaldalonense
intro: Hieracium nigrescens subsp. kaldalonense, also known as the lesser hawkweed, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae) that is native to Iceland. The plant's medicinal properties are attributed to its roots, which contain sesquiterpene lactones and flavonoids, compounds that have been traditionally used to treat various ailments. The health benefits of Hieracium nigrescens subsp. kaldalonense include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce inflammation and protect against cell damage. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea or used in infusions, and its roots can also be dried and used in capsules or tinctures.
